name: System testing
description: Pre-built tests for various systems and technologies.

entries.name: Pliant_Instance_Health_Check
entries.description:
This workflow is for checking the health of a Pliant instance over SSH
Reads the status of each Kubernetes pod and checks to see if everything is running as it should be.
Returns $result.healthy = true if all tests pass, otherwise returns $result.healthy = false
If a problem is detected, reports additional information about each problem pod in the $result.problems array

entries.name: Test SSH Credentials
entries.description: Build a JSON authKey instead of referencing one from the Authentications vault. Takes a username, password, fqdn/IP address, and TCP port, makes an SSH authKey JSON, and tries to run a test command on the target instance. Returns the full output of the SSH block.

entries.name: What is My IP
entries.description:
SSH to a Linux instance and find out what the public IP is.
Uses the public Pliant IP check endpoint on the Internet
Only uses IPv4 at present
